description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.

option.name: --active
tip: Prefer the active virtual environment over the project's virtual environment.

option.name: --bounds
tip: The kind of version specifier to use when adding dependencies.
Possible values: lower, major, minor, exact

option.name: --branch
tip: Branch to use when adding a dependency from Git.

option.name: --constraints
tip: Constrain versions using the given requirements files.

option.name: --dev
tip: Add the requirements to the development dependency group.

option.name: --extra
tip: Extras to enable for the dependency.

option.name: --frozen
tip: Add dependencies without re-locking the project.

option.name: --group
tip: Add the requirements to the specified dependency group.

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --marker
tip: Apply this marker to all added packages.

option.name: --no-install-local
tip: Do not install local path dependencies.

option.name: --no-install-package
tip: Do not install the given package(s).

option.name: --no-install-project
tip: Do not install the current project.

option.name: --no-install-workspace
tip: Do not install any workspace members.

option.name: --no-sync
tip: Avoid syncing the virtual environment after adding.

option.name: --optional
tip: Add the requirements to the package's optional dependencies for the specified extra.

option.name: --package
tip: Add the dependency to a specific package in the workspace.

option.name: --raw
tip: Add a dependency as provided (without transformation).

option.name: --requirements
tip: Add the packages listed in the given files.

option.name: --rev
tip: Commit to use when adding a dependency from Git.

option.name: --script
tip: Add the dependency to the specified Python script.

option.name: --tag
tip: Tag to use when adding a dependency from Git.

option.name: --workspace
tip: Add the dependency as a workspace member.

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --token
tip: The API token to use for login.

root.name: build
tip: Build Python packages into source distributions and wheels.

option.name: --config-setting
tip: Settings to pass to the PEP 517 build backend.

option.name: --package
tip: Build a specific package in the workspace.

next.name: clean
tip: Clear the cache, removing all entries or those linked to specific packages.

next.name: prune
tip: Prune all unreachable objects from the cache.

option.name: --no-sync
tip: Avoid syncing the environment before checking.

option.name: --watch
tip: Watch for file changes and re-check.

root.name: export
tip: Export the project's lockfile to an alternate format.

option.name: --all-groups
tip: Include dependencies from all dependency groups.

option.name: --group
tip: Include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --only-dev
tip: Only include the development dependency group.

option.name: --only-group
tip: Only include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --package
tip: Export dependencies for a specific package in the workspace.

root.name: format
tip: Format Python code in the project.

option.name: --no-pin-python
tip: Do not pin the Python version for the project.

option.name: --no-readme
tip: Do not create a README file.

option.name: --python
tip: The Python version to use for the project.

option.name: --vcs
tip: The version control system to use.

option.name: --check
tip: Check if the lockfile is up-to-date.

option.name: --check-exists
tip: Assert that a `uv.lock` exists without checking if it is up-to-date.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Perform a dry run, without writing the lockfile.

option.name: --exclude-newer
tip: Limit candidate packages to those uploaded prior to the given date.

option.name: --prerelease
tip: The strategy for considering pre-release versions.

option.name: --resolution
tip: The strategy to use when selecting between compatible versions.

option.name: --upgrade
tip: Allow package upgrades, ignoring pinned versions.

option.name: --upgrade-package
tip: Allow upgrades for a specific package.

root.name: pip
tip: Manage Python packages with a pip-compatible interface.

next.name: check
tip: Verify installed packages have compatible dependencies.

next.name: compile
tip: Compile a `requirements.in` file to a `requirements.txt` or `pylock.toml` file.

option.name: --no-emit-package
tip: Do not emit the specified package.

option.name: --upgrade-package
tip: Allow upgrades for a specific package.

next.name: freeze
tip: List, in requirements format, packages installed in an environment.

option.name: --upgrade-package
tip: Allow upgrades for a specific package.

next.name: list
tip: List, in tabular format, packages installed in an environment.

next.name: show
tip: Show information about one or more installed packages.

next.name: sync
tip: Sync an environment with a `requirements.txt` file.

next.name: tree
tip: Display the dependency tree for an environment.

option.name: --depth
tip: The maximum depth of the dependency tree.

option.name: --prune
tip: Prune the given package from the tree.

option.name: --check-url
tip: Check the URL for published distributions.

option.name: --index
tip: The index URL to publish to.

next.name: dir
tip: Show the uv Python installation directory.

next.name: pin
tip: Pin to a specific Python version.

next.name: update-shell
tip: Ensure that the Python executable directory is on the `PATH`.

option.name: --dev
tip: Remove the packages from the development dependency group.

option.name: --frozen
tip: Remove dependencies without re-locking the project.

option.name: --group
tip: Remove the packages from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --no-sync
tip: Avoid syncing the virtual environment after removing.

option.name: --optional
tip: Remove the packages from the specified extra's optional dependencies.

option.name: --package
tip: Remove the dependencies from a specific package in the workspace.

option.name: --script
tip: Remove the dependency from the specified Python script.

option.name: --all-groups
tip: Include dependencies from all dependency groups.

option.name: --extra
tip: Include optional dependencies from the specified extra name.

option.name: --group
tip: Include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --isolated
tip: Run the command in an isolated virtual environment.

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --no-editable
tip: Install any editable dependencies as non-editable.

option.name: --no-install-project
tip: Do not install the current project.

option.name: --no-install-workspace
tip: Do not install any workspace members.

option.name: --no-project
tip: Avoid discovering a project or workspace.

option.name: --no-sync
tip: Avoid syncing the virtual environment before running.

option.name: --only-dev
tip: Only include the development dependency group.

option.name: --only-group
tip: Only include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --package
tip: Run in the environment of a specific package.

option.name: --python
tip: The Python interpreter to use for the command.

option.name: --script
tip: Run as the specified Python script.

option.name: --active
tip: Sync dependencies to the active virtual environment.

option.name: --all-groups
tip: Include dependencies from all dependency groups.

option.name: --all-packages
tip: Sync all packages in the workspace.

option.name: --check
tip: Check if the Python environment is synchronized with the project.

option.name: --compile-bytecode
tip: Compile Python files to bytecode after installation.

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Perform a dry run, without writing the lockfile or modifying the project environment.

option.name: --extra
tip: Include optional dependencies from the specified extra name.

option.name: --group
tip: Include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --inexact
tip: Do not remove extraneous packages present in the environment.

option.name: --link-mode
tip: The method to use when installing packages from the global cache.
Possible values: clone, copy, hardlink, symlink

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --no-editable
tip: Install any editable dependencies as non-editable.

option.name: --no-install-local
tip: Do not install local path dependencies.

option.name: --no-install-package
tip: Do not install the given package(s).

option.name: --no-install-project
tip: Do not install the current project.

option.name: --no-install-workspace
tip: Do not install any workspace members.

option.name: --only-dev
tip: Only include the development dependency group.

option.name: --only-group
tip: Only include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --package
tip: Sync for specific packages in the workspace.

option.name: --prerelease
tip: The strategy for considering pre-release versions.
Possible values: disallow, allow, if-necessary, explicit, if-necessary-or-explicit

option.name: --python
tip: The Python interpreter to use for the project environment.

option.name: --python-platform
tip: The platform for which requirements should be installed.
Possible values: windows, linux, macos, etc.

option.name: --resolution
tip: The strategy to use when selecting between compatible versions.

option.name: --script
tip: Sync the environment for a Python script.

option.name: --upgrade
tip: Allow package upgrades, ignoring pinned versions.

option.name: --upgrade-package
tip: Allow upgrades for a specific package.

root.name: tool
tip: Run and install commands provided by Python packages.

next.name: dir
tip: Show the path to the uv tools directory.

next.name: install
tip: Install commands provided by a Python package.

option.name: --show-paths
tip: Show the installation path of tools.

next.name: run
tip: Run a command provided by a Python package.

next.name: update-shell
tip: Ensure that the tool executable directory is on the `PATH`.

option.name: --all-groups
tip: Include dependencies from all dependency groups.

option.name: --depth
tip: Maximum display depth of the dependency tree.

option.name: --frozen
tip: Display the requirements without re-locking the project.

option.name: --group
tip: Include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --invert
tip: Show the reverse dependencies for the given package.

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --only-dev
tip: Only include the development dependency group.

option.name: --only-group
tip: Only include dependencies from the specified dependency group.

option.name: --outdated
tip: Show the latest available version of each package in the tree.

option.name: --prune
tip: Prune the given package from the display of the dependency tree.

option.name: --python-platform
tip: The platform to use when filtering the tree.

option.name: --python-version
tip: The Python version to use when filtering the tree.

option.name: --script
tip: Show the dependency tree for the specified Python script.

option.name: --show-sizes
tip: Show compressed wheel sizes for packages in the tree.

option.name: --allow-existing
tip: Preserve any existing files or directories at the target path.

option.name: --clear
tip: Remove any existing files or directories at the target path.

option.name: --force
tip: Allow `--clear` to remove a non-virtual environment directory.

option.name: --link-mode
tip: The method to use when installing packages from the global cache.
Possible values: clone, copy, hardlink, symlink

option.name: --no-project
tip: Avoid discovering a project or workspace.

option.name: --prompt
tip: Provide an alternative prompt prefix for the virtual environment.

option.name: --python
tip: The Python interpreter to use for the virtual environment.

option.name: --seed
tip: Install seed packages (pip, setuptools, and wheel) into the virtual environment.

option.name: --system-site-packages
tip: Give the virtual environment access to the system site packages directory.

root.name: version
tip: Read or update the project's version.

option.name: --bump
tip: Update the project version using the given semantics.
Possible values: major, minor, patch, stable, alpha, beta, rc, post, dev

option.name: --dry-run
tip: Don't write a new version to the `pyproject.toml`.

option.name: --frozen
tip: Update the version without re-locking the project.

option.name: --locked
tip: Assert that the `uv.lock` will remain unchanged.

option.name: --no-sync
tip: Avoid syncing the virtual environment after updating the version.

option.name: --package
tip: Update the version of a specific package in the workspace.

next.name: dir
tip: Display the path of a workspace member.

option.name: --package
tip: Display the path to a specific package in the workspace.

next.name: list
tip: List the members of a workspace.

option.name: --scripts
tip: List all standalone scripts with inline metadata in the workspace.

next.name: metadata
tip: View metadata about the current workspace.

common_option.name: --color
tip: Control the use of color in output.

common_option.name: --config-file
tip: The path to a `uv.toml` file to use for configuration.

common_option.name: --directory
tip: Change to the given directory prior to running the command.

common_option.name: --help
tip: Display the concise help for this command.

common_option.name: --managed-python
tip: Require use of uv-managed Python versions.

common_option.name: --no-cache
tip: Avoid reading from or writing to the cache.

common_option.name: --no-managed-python
tip: Disable use of uv-managed Python versions.

common_option.name: --project
tip: Discover a project in the given directory.
